title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at South Indian Bank South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
company: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at South Indian Bank South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About South Indian Bank South Asia Partners:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank South Asia Partners!
